query:
INSERT INTO email_scheduled_messages (
                link_id, message_id, send_time, sent,
                created_at, updated_at
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, NOW(), NOW())
            ON CONFLICT (link_id, message_id) DO UPDATE SET
                send_time = EXCLUDED.send_time,
                sent = EXCLUDED.sent,
                updated_at = NOW()
